description: Every Pixabay search filter the API has — plus a 24-hour local cache, offline search, resumable downloads with built-in attribution, live rate-limit awareness, and agent-native JSON no other Pixabay tool ships.

novel_features.name: Resumable bulk download with attribution
novel_features.description: Download chosen size variants for a collection with parallel workers, re-resolving 24h-expired URLs by id and writing per-file attribution sidecars; re-runs skip what's already on disk.

novel_features.name: Live rate-limit awareness
novel_features.description: Surface the X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset headers from your last call (which no other Pixabay tool exposes) and project how many requests a planned batch of requests will cost before it throttles.

novel_features.name: Unified image + video search
novel_features.description: Fan one query across both the image and video endpoints in parallel and merge stills and footage into a single ranked, persisted result set.

novel_features.name: Offline more-like-this
novel_features.description: Find synced hits that share the most tags with a given id using a local tag-set overlap (Jaccard) score — no API endpoint for this exists.

novel_features.name: Engagement deltas over time
novel_features.description: Snapshot views/downloads/likes/comments on each sync and report the deltas per tag or id between sync runs.

novel_features.name: Contributor ranking
novel_features.description: Aggregate synced image and video hits by contributor and rank them by total or average downloads, likes, or views across your store.

novel_features.name: Named offline collections
novel_features.description: Group synced hits into named local collections that feed downstream pull, similar, and trends — persistence no Pixabay tool offers.
